briefing.title: 003 Mech Deployment Mission
briefing.text: Mech deployment receipt map loaded through mission runtime. 3x3 mech footprint validation should remain intact.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Mech deployment online. Footprint validation should still use real occupancy rules.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Victory. Mech deployment survived the mission wrapper.

lines.name: Mission Control
lines.text: Defeat. Mech deployment mission ended correctly.
